content: Solsight is a decentralized exchange (DEX) platform on the Solana ecosystem, allowing users to easily trade, inspect, and analyze data directly from the blockchain without any intermediaries.

Solsight is built on Solana — a prominent blockchain known for its ability to process tens of thousands of transactions per second, extremely low transaction fees (around $0.00025 per transaction), and robust scalability.

Solsight solves the issues of traditional finance: transactions no longer need to go through multiple time-consuming and costly intermediaries. On Solsight, all transactions are processed directly, almost instantly, transparently, and immutably on the blockchain.

Key features of Solsight include: portfolio tracking, discovery of trending tokens, token swapping, wallet tracking, price alerts, multi-chart token comparison, and an AI assistant to support analysis.
Solsight allows users to add multiple personal wallets, view asset overviews, analyze transaction history, and buy/sell tokens directly within the application.
Data on Solsight is fetched directly from the blockchain, ensuring integrity, immutability, and independence from any intermediaries. Users always see the most accurate and real-time data.
Solsight's target audience includes: individual investors wanting to manage crypto assets, DeFi projects requiring analytical tools, and organizations wishing to verify transparent blockchain data.

The Solsight Insurance Fund is a staking feature: users deposit SOL into the insurance fund to earn yield. The SOL is staked via the Jito stake pool, providing a competitive APY from Solana staking rewards.

Process to stake SOL on Solsight: go to the Portfolio page → Staking tab → enter the amount of SOL to stake → confirm the transaction in your wallet. Your SOL will be deposited into the Insurance Fund and start earning yield.

Process to unstake SOL on Solsight consists of 2 steps: 1) Request Unstake to initiate the cooldown period. 2) Once the cooldown expires, execute Complete Unstake to receive the SOL back to your wallet.
The cooldown period when unstaking from the Solsight Insurance Fund is approximately 10 days. During this period, the SOL pending withdrawal continues to earn yield until the process is completed.

Types of activities in the Portfolio transaction history: SWAP (token exchange on DEX), STAKE (deposit SOL into the Insurance Fund), UNSTAKE (withdraw SOL from the Insurance Fund), TRANSFER_IN (receive SOL/token), TRANSFER_OUT (send SOL/token).
The Multi-Chart feature on Solsight allows users to compare price charts of multiple tokens simultaneously, helping investors easily cross-reference performance and make investment decisions.
The Wallet Tracker feature on Solsight allows users to track any Solana wallet, viewing its transaction history and assets in real-time.
The price alert feature (Notifications) on Solsight: users can set price thresholds for tokens, and the system will send notifications as soon as the price hits the target level.
Solsight AI is a built-in smart assistant that can answer questions about portfolios, tokens, transactions, and guide users on how to navigate features across the platform.

To swap tokens on Solsight: go to the page of the token you want to buy → select Swap → enter the amount → confirm the transaction in your wallet. The swap feature is custom-built by Solsight, not integrated from Jupiter or Raydium.
The Discovery page (/) on Solsight displays trending tokens, newly listed tokens, and hot tokens on Solana in real-time.
The Portfolio page (/portfolio) on Solsight displays total asset value, portfolio allocation, transaction history, and investment performance of all connected wallets.

Solana is a high-performance blockchain with approximately 65,000 transactions per second, sub-second confirmation times, and very low transaction fees. This is why Solsight selected Solana as its foundation.
SOL is the native currency of Solana, used to pay transaction fees and participate in staking. All activities on Solsight require a small amount of SOL to cover gas fees.
Liquid staking allows you to stake SOL and still receive a liquid staking token (LST) to use in DeFi, instead of having it completely locked like traditional staking.
jitoSOL is the token representing SOL staked via Jito. The value of jitoSOL increases over time relative to SOL due to continuously accumulating staking rewards.

A DEX (Decentralized Exchange) is a decentralized trading platform that allows token swaps directly from a wallet without creating an account or using a centralized exchange. Major DEXs on Solana include Jupiter, Raydium, Orca, and Meteora.
Jupiter is the leading DEX aggregator on Solana, automatically finding the best swap routes across multiple liquidity pools.

PnL (Profit and Loss): the difference between the current value and the initial cost basis. Realized PnL is the profit/loss from closed positions. Unrealized PnL is the profit/loss on active positions.
ROI (Return on Investment): return rate = (profit / capital invested) × 100%. Win rate: percentage of profitable trades = (number of winning trades / total number of trades) × 100%.

Market cap (market capitalization) = token price × circulating supply. FDV (Fully Diluted Valuation) = price × maximum supply. A large gap between market cap and FDV is often a warning sign of token unlock risks.

Slippage is the difference between the expected price and the actual price of a swap. Causes: low liquidity or excessively large orders. It is recommended to set a slippage tolerance of 0.5–1% for most standard transactions.
A Solana wallet stores your crypto assets. Popular wallets compatible with Solsight include Phantom, Solflare, and Backpack. You must connect your wallet to use all of Solsight's features.

Solsight aims to serve the Vietnamese and global Web3 community, contributing to the adoption of blockchain technology in daily life and the digital economy through a transparent, accessible DeFi platform.
The Swap feature on Solsight is custom-developed by the Solsight team, not integrated from a third party like Jupiter or Raydium. Users swap tokens directly on the Solsight platform.
The Staking (Insurance Fund) feature on Solsight is a smart contract custom-built and deployed on Solana by the Solsight team. It is not integrated from an external staking protocol.
Solsight was founded by 6 members: Le Nguyen Hong Ngoc, Vo Van Nam, Nguyen Dang Minh Lan, Hoang Thanh Thao Nguyen, Nguyen Ngoc Dang, and Thai Dinh Ngan.
